description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has short sleeves with slight ruching, graphic print on the front, and brand logo embroidrered at the nape of the neckFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm ironDo not dry cleanDo not iron directly on print/trims/ logoYou know how they say, “when in doubt, wear white”...this white t-shirt from puma takes this saying and makes it better by adding funky graphic print on the front! The green print is eye-catching and funky, which will make you stand out in a sea of people! Plus, the elastane in the tee guarantees a great Fit. Team it with jeans or shorts and casual shoes to look fab.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
